allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('github'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linked'\)\); console.log\(keys\)")
